summary: Milestones Tab | Hearing Announcement When Focusing on a Milestone
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Milestones tab
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on a milestone
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “In the <insert inning number> in the Milestones Carousel, X of X Milestones, *Play Type of Milestone*, *Play Description of Milestone*, Select to view this play”
